Returns a list of unit output data based on the unit input data.

get.description: For example: ID 0 Inlet / Outlet Temperature

get.description: Only differs from GET defaultinputdata for DX evaporators.

get.description: Returns list of countries with CO2 emission factors and country codes

Returns the impact rating for a unit input.

get.summary: Returns a list of tuples of input mode capacities IDs and the corresponding description.

post.summary: Returns a list of part load calculation AKA night operation based on the part load input data.

get.summary: Returns all product categories available on this instance
Returns the properties of single-phase fluids.
get.description:
// input:                                              
int FluidID                                          
float conc // concentration in %                     
float temp // temperature in Â°C                      
float pressure // pressure (for fluid air) in bar    
// output:                                           
float rho // density in kg/m3                       
float cp // specific heat in J/(kg*K)               
float lambda // heat conductivity in W/(m*K)        
float eta // dynamic viscosity in Pa*s              
float pr // Prandtl number in 1                     
float ps)// vapour pressure (for some fluids) in bar

post.summary: Returns the output data i.e. FindUnitsResultOutputData from a GPC native file.

post.summary: Returns one unit output data based on its output data, language, and (physical) unit system.

Bearer.name: Authorization
